name: codecut
description: Codecut is a local Agent video editor for self-media creators. It is built on the Codex plugin: Codex understands the content, generates or selects assets, and writes a clear editing plan; Codecut then applies that plan to a local web timeline for creators to preview, adjust, and export.

interface.shortDescription: Local Agent video editor for self-media creators.
interface.longDescription: Codecut is a local Agent video editor for self-media creators. It is built on the Codex plugin: Codex understands the content, generates or selects assets, and writes a clear editing plan; Codecut then applies that plan to a local web timeline for creators to preview, adjust, and export.
defaultPrompt: Open Codecut and set up a local video editing workspace.
Import my local video into Codecut and prepare a short-form edit.
Turn this source clip into a 30-90 second vertical short with captions.
